## Problem / Use Case

<!-- What problem does this feature solve? Who benefits? -->

## Proposed Solution

<!-- How should this work? Include CLI usage examples if applicable. -->

```bash
hms2cng <proposed-command> <arguments>
```

## Alternatives Considered

<!-- Any alternative approaches you considered and why you prefer the proposed solution. -->

## Additional Context

<!-- Mockups, references, related issues, or links to similar tools. -->

> **Tip:** Try prototyping with an LLM first. If you have a working proof-of-concept, link it here or open a PR directly.
